notes: The critical discriminator on this image is recognizing that the 6 frames form a single looping RUN CYCLE, not 6 distinct actions (sitting, lying down, crouching, etc.). Top performers (qwen3-vl-8b, qwen3.5-4b-nothink, qwen3.6-27b-nothink, glm-4.6v-flash-9b) explicitly use cyclical/looping language and avoid fabricating unrelated poses. Most failures come from inventing 'sitting upright', 'lying flat', or 'superman pose' descriptions for frames that are actually mid-stride. Note qwen3.5-4b|think produced an empty/truncated response. Interestingly, several nothink variants outperformed their think counterparts (qwen3.5-4b, qwen3.6-27b), suggesting extended thinking sometimes led to over-interpretation of individual frames. Larger Gemma models (26b, 31b) did not outperform smaller ones meaningfully. Color and structural details (grid, numbers, palette) were nearly universally accurate - the differentiator is purely the animation-cycle insight.
